steps.title: Spot the matching scenario
steps.content: The passage documents one flaw: predictions are too high for large mammals in large forests. Since Beaverhead-Deerlodge is a large forest, this error applies.

steps.title: Apply the documented error
steps.content:
When predictions are too high, the model overestimates actual population sizes.

For this large forest, it would overestimate large-mammal populations.

Choices A and C either misidentify the affected animals or introduce mechanisms not discussed, while D characterizes the error as reflecting other factors.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
